markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss implementation of CVE database project on SentinelOne's new ContentStack CMS and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to build CVE index page + individual CVE pages on SentinelOne's new ContentStack CMS](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [SentinelOne team still in content modeling phase; alignment needed on field structure](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Access to ContentStack requires SentinelOne email + Okta authentication; process initiated for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Frontend will be built by SentinelOne team using Next.js, integrating with existing components](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview & Scope

  - [GrowthX building CVE index page (main browsing/search page) + individual CVE detail pages](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Pages to be built directly in new ContentStack CMS, not WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [GrowthX responsible for setting up content types in ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Uncertainty about GrowthX's involvement in UI development; needs clarification](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Content Structure & Integration

  - [Main content mostly free text (markdown)](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Some structured fields needed for categorization on index page](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [John (S1) to ensure no duplicate fields in backend](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [CVE pages to be set up as isolated entry type to avoid conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Search functionality to be integrated with Algolia](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Data Pipeline & API

  - [GrowthX pulls data from official CVE sources, transforms into articles](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Pipeline runs on GrowthX's internal tool](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Nicolas to receive ContentStack read token to study API structure](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Plan to use Content Management API for pushing data](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### Access & Security

  - [Sydney (GrowthX) has SentinelOne email, needs ContentStack access via Okta](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Nicolas (Uruguay) needs SentinelOne email; process initiated (1-2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [VDI access required, expected to be slow](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### Design & Frontend

  - [Current design is early mock-up, being reviewed by SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [George Main (designer) to share Figma file with SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [SentinelOne building frontend with Next.js TypeScript](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Will reuse existing components (e.g., breadcrumbs) where possible](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

## Next Steps

  - [John to send Nicolas ContentStack docs + Postman collection with read key](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [John & Nicolas to schedule follow-up meeting for detailed alignment](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Joery to initiate SentinelOne email creation for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [John to file IT ticket for Sydney's ContentStack access](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Sydney to test Okta dashboard access](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [SentinelOne team to review shared Figma design file](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [GrowthX team to clarify extent of involvement in UI development](https://fathom.video/share/7hzmjffBVENnr2nC_Y4-nNnXgAiDu35W?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
